fault_hypothesis: Line 80 incorrectly slices `data[:-1]`, which removes the last byte of the assembled payload. The return should be `data` without any slicing.

spec.expr: len(__cbfl_result) == sum(len(part) for _, part in chunk_list)

constraints.intent: The returned bytes length must equal the total length of all chunk data, not one less.

spec.expr: len(data) == sum(len(p) for _, p in chunk_list[:chunk_list.index((_, part)) + 1])

constraints.intent: After each iteration, accumulated data length should equal the sum of parts processed so far.
data starts as EMPTY_PAYLOAD (empty bytes) before the loop accumulates chunks.

spec.expr: len(__cbfl_result) == sum(len(part) for _, part in chunks) or len(chunks) == 0

constraints.intent: The final returned payload must not be shorter than the total input data.
